title: Aloo Khage?? (AlooCraft)
description: Enter the Aloo Dimension! Discover magical, troll, and overpowered potatoes. Each aloo gives random effects, items, and pure Meme Fun.
body:
**This mod takes the legendary “Aloo Khaoge?” moment and turns it into a full Minecraft experience with potatoes that are not only edible, but magical, dangerous, and sometimes just plain weird**.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-gs6oVFVZLM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

🌟 Features

![aloos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c383c8a854b7749ba3a96aa952cd30f58b9d1aac.png)

🥔 11 Unique Types of Potatoes
- Normal Aloo (Normal Potato)
- sada aloo (Rotten Potato)
- Masala Aloo (Masala Potato)
- Spicy aloo (Spicy Potato)
- Diamond aloo (Diamond Potato)
- emerald aloo (Emerald Potato)
- golden aloo (Golden Potato)
- milk aloo (Milk Potato)
- soul aloo (Soul Potato)
- sus aloo (Sus Potato)
- tnt aloo (TNT Potato)



**Not your regular boring baked potatoes.
Each aloo variant comes with its own surprise – from OP buffs to troll effects. Eat them if you dare, or collect them to craft custom potato-based weapons!
**
🌌 The Potato Dimension (Aloo Dimension)
![aloo dimension](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a81d88f5d1e5bd8e5d95949ccb4c74a21b2b7878.png)

**Tired of the Overworld? Step into the Aloo Dimension – a strange new world built entirely of Aloo Blocks.**
![portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0118a871cb2347038c6e2f2785ee687acbadd254.png)

**_Break an Aloo Block → get random potatoes!_**

Use those potatoes to eat, craft, or power yourself up.
![aloo man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cee849f7b975ffaf76e1f31d6f10b1fa186dbe77.png)

**A land where everything is potato-themed, yet full of hidden dangers.**

👾 Aloofied Mobs

![aloofied zombies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1923b5cc2d40f897370cc4fb91382f104932b6a8.png)

There’s a dark story behind this dimension.
Once upon a time, a player fed too many potatoes to the mobs… until they transformed into Aloofied versions of themselves. Now they roam the Aloo Dimension, attacking any outsider who dares to enter.

Creepers? Aloofied.

Zombies? Aloofied.


<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

![alooblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7d80cee0f59b3e11f4e56c6bd67dc4680010f9e.png)
Portal Block (Block Of Aloo)

![Activator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a58e479cc8d7e6dba14de06e7b8f81c27f3da44.png)
Portal Activator Recipe 

![aloo pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb8e1cedb4717bb2f33f9862c316d0333e4bd590.png)
aloo pickaxe

![aloo launcher](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5346b119dd5570bd51d83107c0ffed57ab4dd8db.png)
aloo launcher

![Aloo Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f80d21c81b270ee2eb2772a9c13c0430bbc2e440.png)
aloo sword

</details>




⚠️ Warning: Too much aloo may cause uncontrollable laughter and unexpected explosions.
